content.en:
At the position where he had just gone a little deeper, Ye Tian took out the Infinite Realm Armor and asked the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to protect himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian was looking for a slightly safer position.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian hid in a fragment, and then began to copy his body.

He didn't want to break into the eternal ruins with just a real copy body, otherwise what if the copy body fell or was severely injured and was on the verge of death?

There are so many Heavenly Ancestors in the outside world, he doesn't want to come in again and again, otherwise the secret of copying his body will inevitably be exposed.

Therefore, he still directly copied the body here in the Eternal True Ruins, and if it was severely damaged, he would return here to replace the copied body.

Soon, the copy of the body was successful.

Immediately, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies had been hiding here, and he went to another seemingly safe place to hide a replica body, and then let the third replica body take the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to go deep into the Eternal True Ruins to find the treasure of chance.

......

"Not good, dangerous!"

Ye Tian suddenly sensed the death crisis.

Black branches pierced through in an instant.

He immediately asked the Infinite Realm Armorer to protect him, but he was still one step too slow.

The unknown creature seemed to appear out of thin air, and its attack speed was too fast.

Poof!

Ye Tian was pierced through his body by a branch, and he was directly hit hard.

And at this time, the Infinite Realm Armor directly swallowed it into his abdomen, which saved his life.

Rumble!!!

The Infinite Realm Armor struck out and fought the unknown creature.

Soon, the unknown creature appeared, a creature with countless branches, each of which could stretch infinitely and possess terrifying attacks.

"Peak fifth-stage combat power, and it's very close to the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power!"

Ye Tian judged instantly.

Although the opponent's strength is strong, it is not yet the opponent of the Infinite Realm Armor.

Bang bang bang!!

Countless branches hit the body of the Infinite Realm Armorer, without penetrating its defenses at all, nor did it cause damage to Ye Tian inside the Infinite Realm Armor.

At this time, the creature used countless branches to bind the Infinite Realm Armor.

"Shattered!"

The power of the Infinite Realm Armor exploded, and the invisible power directly shattered the creature.

The next moment.

The Infinite Realm Armor rushed over, pressing a hand on the creature's body.

Click!!!

This creature was directly shattered by the Infinite Realm Armor with this area.

With just one blow, the opponent was not lightly injured.

In an instant, the Infinite Realm Armor entered a true extreme combat state, slashing away countless phantoms with both hands, each of which could shatter countless space-time regions.

And the realm of the Infinite Realm Armor is also firmly locked on this creature, making it impossible for it to escape.

But before the Infinite Realm Armor could kill him, other strange creatures seemed to emerge around him.

"Run!"

Ye Tian urged the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to immediately flee and leave here.

There is no point in killing these creatures, but once they are caught in a bitter battle, it is dangerous, and it is likely that even the Infinite Realm Armor will have to be lost.

So, there was no need for him to stay here and fight the creature.

After all, the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior was an invincible-level fifth-stage combat force, so it was very fast, and it didn't take long for him to break out of the encirclement.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned, and he needed to replace the copy body.

The replica body had been badly damaged, and it would take a long time to heal slowly.

Therefore, he replaced it directly.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully replace a replica body, annihilating the injured replica body.

"Continue to explore the Eternal Ruins!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, he was more careful and avoided the area before.

Soon, he had something to gain.

He sensed a white metal in one of the shards.

"White copper real gold!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, this is a good thing, it is a material in the formula of Qinglong liquid, and it can also be used to forge weapons.

For example, many weapons needed by the Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor would use materials such as white copper and real gold.

It can be said that such a piece of real white copper gold is worth a lot of money, and it is difficult to find it in the outside world, but there are many here.

Ye Tian immediately put it away, and then continued to explore.

He wasn't ready to return yet, after all, just a piece of real white copper gold was not too precious, and if he only found a real piece of white copper gold, he would have to go back and forth.

And on the way back, it may not be safe, and you may encounter danger.

So, he chose to move on.

It didn't take long for him to have another harvest, but then he ran into danger.

This time, he was injured again.

I have to say that his strength is too weak, and no one can beat him in the Eternal True Ruins.

However, he can change and replicate his body again and again, so it is not a big problem.

Unlike other Great Ancestors, even if it is an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor, there is a risk of falling at any time.

As time passed, Ye Tian gained more and more.

And he would occasionally encounter some Fifth Stage Great Ancestors, and once he encountered them, he would avoid them in advance.

However, sometimes, some Great Ancestors are too deeply hidden, and they don't even have a copy talent, so they will inevitably encounter them.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, the other party was hiding too deeply, and used a treasure to completely hide himself.

The only flaw of the Infinite Realm Armor is that it cannot spy on the enemy, and the copy talent does not perceive the opponent.

When the copying talent sensed it, it was the Great Ancestor who directly attacked him.

Rumble!!!!

A spear carrying a variety of immeasurable supernatural powers instantly pierced through, and its power had already surpassed the peak fifth-stage combat power.

"An invincible-level fifth-stage combat power Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian's expression changed drastically.

There was only one reason why such a Great Ancestor attacked him, and that was to kill him and capture this Infinite Realm Armor.

Before being killed, Ye Tian gave an order to this Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to die with the other party at all costs.

Poof!

Ye Tian's body was pierced and killed by a single blow, and he had no power to resist.

"A mere fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, relying on an immeasurable armor to break through the Eternal True Ruins, what a death!"

The Great Ancestor laughed and laughed.

But just as he was about to collect the Infinite Realm Armor, the Infinite Realm Armor broke out directly.

Rumble!!!

This Great Ancestor was directly knocked into the air.

"How could it be !!"

This Great Ancestor was stunned.

The master is dead, how can the Infinite Realm armor still move?

In the next moment, the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior fought with him desperately, fighting beyond the limit, and was not afraid of the damage of the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior at all.

Soon.

Many creatures have sprung up all around, surrounding the place.

He tried to escape, but the Infinite Armor wouldn't let him escape.

Not long after, this Great Ancestor was destroyed by the combined efforts of many creatures, and the Infinite Realm Armor was also beaten to pieces.

Somewhere in the Eternal Ruins.

Ye Tian's other copy body said coldly: "Beifeng Great Ancestor, if you don't die, I will definitely kill you next time!"

Immediately, he began to copy the Infinite Realm Armor, and the Infinite Realm Armor was directly dismantled by him.
